Bitter Blade of the Icepaw  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 22
DMG: 10 Dmg Bonus: 35 AC: 15
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 7.0 Size: TINY
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Bitter Blade of the Icepaw
Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Slashing Atk Delay: 22
DMG: 10 Dmg Bonus: 35 AC: 15
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 7.0 Size: TINY
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:1H Slashing
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:25 pp 2 gp 5 sp 2 cp
Tribute:1358
Lucy Entry By:Atarak
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 08:33:11
Page Updated:Mon Jul 23rd, 2012

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 45
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Velketor's Labyrinth
NPC Name
Jelek Icepaw
Tpos Icepaw


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Velketor's Labyrinth


Uploaded April 27th, 2024 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
Post Comment
One heck of a twink weapon
QuoteReply
# Jul 29 2003 at 9:10 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591778129393
Scholar
59 posts
Nice ratio, fairly fast, and 15 AC. No lvl recommendation. I had not seen this blade before, but was doing a bazaar search for a nice lil 1HS for a level 7 Ranger my son sometimes plays. Saw the name and a low price (110 pp I believe) and checked the stats.

Quite a nice low level weapon for any of the classes that can use, especially the dual wielding ones. Indeed, I may 'borrow' it on my rogue for soloing light blues for the AC gain alone.
▲ Page top

9 posts


Stats are ok but not great 15ac is nice but not worth 6k maybe 1-2k thats it

Don't worry about the weight unless you solo
QuoteReply
# Nov 25 2001 at 2:05 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591749822609
2 posts
I use this sword in primary and depending on how much aggro I want to avoid either Flux Axe, or a non proc weapon offhand, my sta is less than 100 and I still won't go oos in a normal group fight of 1 or 2 mobs, now if I try to melee a mob solo I'll use sta spell. Great ranger weapon for the ac and lack of taunt

Quextal
53 Pathfinder
▲ Page top
guessing price
QuoteReply
# Sep 08 2001 at 7:44 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591758653941
14 posts
while the weight is less than great, the dmg/dly ratio is very good and the 15ac is outstanding and the rarity of the item is very rare i'd say someone could easily get 5k for this, and judging by some of the outrageous prices i see in ec, maybe all the way up to 10k. 15ac is very very nice.

15 AC is freaking SICK for a weapon i would gladly pay round 5k for this thing, if anyone is selling it on Cazic gimme a tell, names Bracc :)

Look at the weight compared to a wurmslayer.. Its very light and gives more ac, just leaves off some str and MR, still all in all a nice weapon.

Holy Order of Tunare
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 03 2001 at 2:26 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I really want one of these I just hope you dont have to be 45 to usethis and really who cares about a coupleofpounds us war can take it =)
RE: Gimme one
QuoteReply
# Aug 03 2001 at 10:42 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591754842910
104 posts
While alot of us do wish that there were a minimum level required to equip some items, there isn't, the level to attain listed above is Allakhazam's opinion of the level you need to be to get this item. To use it you merely need to be 1 of the listed classes and races (and deity in some cases), the only part of items that do have level resrictions is proc's and triggered effects. Hope that helps
▲ Page top
RE: Gimme one
QuoteReply
# Aug 10 2001 at 1:14 AM Rating: Decent
Xvunuthut
1 post
Actually there are weapons that have a level limit to equip. I know of one mace, 17/27 I think, that requires you to be level 50 to equip it. Sucks cause my Ranger is 47 still and I have it.

Ok personaly i think this a great duel wielders weapon dam del is awesome and 15 ac GOOD LORD its nuts. So it may be a bit hvy but sure kicks the crap outta the shield of the slain unicorn for stats and Ac and lots of Classes can use. Nice weapon in short = )

# Apr 24 2001 at 7:45 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Heh, just get your sta over 100. When your yellow bar goes away...you don't lose stats, just the ability to jump...thats it. No need for invigor or any thing else, just cast a sta buff on them, or just get sta gear, get your sta over 100, and don't worry about it.

RE: uhh

# Jan 19 2002 at 11:57 PM Rating: Default

92 posts

QuoteReply
# Mar 03 2001 at 11:20 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Thats the point, you can attack with it :P The heavier the weapon is the faster it drains your stamina...
▲ Page top
RE: uhh
QuoteReply
# Mar 05 2001 at 7:41 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592246185632
49 posts
uhh...ever hear of invigor? it's so simple to get invigor. And with half the melee world using wurmslayers etc how can you complain?

also, consider this- it only drains stamina when you swing it...offhand doesn't swing anywhere near as much...so even when dual-wielding this with a wurmslayer, it is no big deal.

Get some armor with right-clickable invigor!

Talian Stormseeker,
53rd Ranger, Zero Hour
Povar
▲ Page top
Verant's plan
QuoteReply
# Mar 05 2001 at 2:28 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245551279
31 posts
That seems to be a typical gripe with many of the new velios items is that they are heavy...Anyone that understands gaming should realize that in order to preserve "balance" many good items will have a disadvantage, in this case weight. Stamina may be more important to some than others..Just something to think about.
▲ Page top
great bard weapon
QuoteReply
# Apr 02 2001 at 11:10 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
If it is a bard concerned about stamina...WTF...we get group sta regen at lvl two. Just leave it memmed in hotkey slot 6. Then when sta goes down twist it in once and you'll have about a bub and a half to two bubs more sta. Verant also likes to come up with uses for the songs/spells that everyone forgets about.

Shaiuluud
Bard of the 33 song
Torvonillous
